Interface ProductRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Product,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Product,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Product,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Product,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Product,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Product>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Product,UUID>
@Repository public interface ProductRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Product,UUID>
Provides the access methods for database of Product objects. The repository uses Spring Data JPA to retrieve and update product records in the database.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    deleteByIdAndUserId(UUID id, UUID userId)
    Deletes a product by its specified id.
    Optional<Product>
    findByIdAndUserId(UUID id, UUID userId)
    Finds a product via its id if owned by a specific user.
    List<Product>
    findByUserId(UUID userId)
    Finds all products owned by specified user.

  • Method Details

    • findByUserId

      List<Product> findByUserId(UUID userId)
      Finds all products owned by specified user.
      Parameters:
      userId - the id of the user who owns the products
      Returns:
      a list of products owned by the user

    • findByIdAndUserId

      Optional<Product> findByIdAndUserId(UUID id, UUID userId)
      Finds a product via its id if owned by a specific user.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the product
      userId - the id of the user who owns the product
      Returns:
      product if found, empty if not found

    • deleteByIdAndUserId

      @Transactional long deleteByIdAndUserId(UUID id, UUID userId)
      Deletes a product by its specified id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the product
      userId - the id of the user who owns the product
      Returns:
      the number of rows deleted
